description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a metallic body with a prominent wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The receiver and barrel are finished in a silvery metallic color, contrasting with the deep reddish-brown wood components. The rifle has a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK platform, and standard iron sights mounted along the top. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible mechanical details such as the trigger, magazine release, and charging handle.
description: A metallic AK-47 style rifle with a wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine, featuring iron sights and a simple muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the alignment of the barrel, iron sights, and the slim profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden components and the metallic receiver, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the rifle, showing the magazine curvature and trigger guard.
